selectionRule: Prefer primary sources. A vendor announcement may establish what was announced but not whether it works; material performance claims require independent corroboration.

tiers.1: Regulator, government, court, legislature, credit union, audited filing, research paper, or directly responsible organization
tiers.2: Credible independent reporting, established trade publication, or attributable expert research
tiers.3: Vendor marketing, consultancy commentary, event recap, or uncorroborated secondary summary
tiers.4: Anonymous, scraped, synthetic, unverifiable, or low-accountability source
